name: Katie McGinty
subject: Tell Toomey: (climate change)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5317445060369842176/-3223428343546249216?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate)
---
Friend --

You may know that I have a history of fighting for environmental causes. I worked with Vice President Al Gore to strengthen the Clean Air Act, led President Clinton's White House Council on Environmental Quality, and headed the Pennsylvania Department of Environmental Protection under Governor Ed Rendell.

I've dedicated my career to protecting our environment and making sure our kids can live in the world they inherit. So when Republicans like Pat Toomey not only refuse to take action on climate change, _but also refuse to even acknowledge that the science behind it is real_ \-- that's not something I can accept.

**[Will you add your name to demand Republicans in Congress stop denying climate science and take action?](https://act.myngp.com/el/5317445060369842176/-3223428343546249216?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate)**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5317445060369842176/-3223428343546249216?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate)
---

It's long past time for our country to take meaningful steps to address the very real threat of climate change. And to do that, we need ALL of our leaders in Washington to accept the scientific data and acknowledge climate change is real.

When we do that, we can harness our renewable energy resources to create good jobs and cut electricity bills for taxpayers. We will support innovations in clean energy technologies and level the playing field for companies that adopt them -- policies I championed in Pennsylvania and plan to lead on in the U.S. Senate.

**None of this will happen as long as Republicans like Pat Toomey -- who has an appalling 0% rating from the League of Conservation Voters -- continue denying reality.**

**[Tell Toomey and his friends in Congress: Stop denying climate science.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5317445060369842176/-3223428343546249216?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate)**

Thanks for your help,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5317445060369842176/-3079313155470393344?refcode=e20160416&refcode2=e20160416&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5317445060369842176/-3295485937584177152).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Thursday night’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
A couple of days left | Friend --

We're just three days out from the New York primary, and Hillary is fighting her heart out for every last vote -- did you catch her laying out her plans to break down the barriers that hold Americans back in Thursday night’s debate? She was amazing!

But we can’t ignore that the Sanders campaign is outspending us on New York TV ads by more than $2 million, and we only have a couple of days left to close the gap and make our case. **Your donation today will make a difference in how many voters we can reach, so if you want Hillary to win this nomination, today is the day to show it (and when you give for the first time, we’ll send you a free sticker!):** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks for your help! I know Hillary can count on you.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUyNTczMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDk2MzU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: John Weaver
subject: The choice is yours
body:
Many Americans have voted already but even they still have
another choice to make.

Peter, many Americans have
voted already but even they still have another choice to make.

Nearly every poll in 2016 has
shown that Gov. John Kasich is the ONLY Republican who can defeat
Hillary Clinton. Our party still has a chance to unify behind the
one candidate who can win the White House.

Will you chip in to help Gov.
Kasich raise the funds he needs to continue gathering delegates,
to deny Trump the nomination and ensure that he'll have momentum
headed into the convention? The choice is yours - make a
difference today.

Your contribution of $10 or more
before Sunday evening earns you a chance to receive one of five
signed copies of Gov. Kasich's best-selling book 'Every Other
Monday'

Peter - Can you help us hit our
goal?

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

Our positive message is working
as more American's hear it. Thank you for your support!

John Weaver
Chief Strategist
JohnKasich.com

Kasich For America Contest Rules

Contest ends April 17, 2016
at 11:59pm EDT.
Limit one entry per
individual.
A donation of $10 or more
will automatically enter you in the contest.
You can enter without making
a contribution by clicking here.
Entering this Promotion by
making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of
winning.
Void where prohibited.

See full terms & conditions
below.
NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR
WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to
enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not
increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend
on the number of entries received. Only individuals who are
legally permitted to make contributions to Kasich For America may
enter by making a contribution.

Void where prohibited.

Entrants agree to be bound by
these Rules and by the decisions of the Sponsor, which are final
and binding in all respects. To be eligible to win the prize,
entries must be completed and received by the Sponsor as
specified below. All applicable federal, state, and local laws
and regulations apply.

Please click here to enter by
making a contribution of $10.

Please click here to enter
without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the
online entry form during the contest period.

This Promotion begins on
Thursday, April 14, 2016 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and
ends on Sunday, April 17, 2016 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time
("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern
Standard Time on Sunday.

Five winners will receive the
following Prize: one signed copy of Gov. John Kasich's book
'Every Other Monday'.

This Promotion is open to
citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the
United States who are at least 18 years of age or the age of
majority as determined by state law. Prize may not be substituted
or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state,
and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize
awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner.

The winner of this Promotion will
be notified on or before Monday, April 18, 2016. Unless otherwise
prohibited by applicable law, submitting an entry or accepting
the Prize in this Promotion constitutes the entrant's permission
to use his or her name, hometown, likeness, and/or prize
information, without limitation, for promotional purposes without
further permission or compensation. As a condition of being
awarded the Prize, the winner may be required to executive and
deliver to Sponsor a signed affidavit of eligibility and
acceptance of these Terms & Conditions and release of liability,
and any other legal, regulatory, or tax-related documents as
required by the Sponsor.

The Sponsor of this Promotion is
Kasich For America, Post Office Box 1344, Columbus, Ohio 43216.

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Donna Edwards
subject: They want us to back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Friend, 10 days from Election Day my opponent and his super PACs are blanketing the airwaves with negative, personal attack ads.
You know the type of ads I'm talking about. The ones where they take my face, lay over some grainy black and white image, and then hide who paid for it in the beginning. You would think Karl Rove or the Koch Brothers were behind them.
**Here 's why: they want us to back down.**
They want us to back down and say it's ok to cut backroom deals with the NRA so they can buy off politicians in Washington.
They want us to back down and say it's ok to put Social Security and Medicare cuts on the table just to get a deal.
They want us to back down and say it's ok to vote for bad trade deal after bad trade deal that ship our jobs overseas and harm our environment.
**[But I won't back down. These are progressive values that we cannot compromise on. If you won't back down either, make a contribution so we can win this primary and build a Senate that will fight for our values.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff9d/767134fb/5c5b33fa/4338f78e/532467417/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDE2LU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160416-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
If you step up now and give $5 there is no amount of special interest money or attack ad that can stop us.
Thank you for being a part of this fight,
Donna
**[](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff9d/767134fb/5c5b33fa/4338f78e/532467417/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDE2LU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160416-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
** **
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you would like to receive less email, please [click here](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff9d/767134fb/5c5b33fa/4338f78f/532467417/VEsF/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/s/receive-less-email"). If you would like to contribute to Donna's campaign to be Maryland's next Senator [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff9d/767134fb/5c5b33fa/4338f78c/532467417/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaWDE5IjoiZW0yMDE2MDQxNi1ORCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dfesplash?refcode=footer_em20160416-ND") If you want to learn more about Donna, please visit [www.donnaedwardsforsenate.com](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff9d/767134fb/5c5b33fa/4338f78d/532467417/VEsD/ "http://donnaedwardsforsenate.com"). Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails from the Donna Edwards for Senate Campaign, please [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff9d/767134fb/5c5b33fa/4338f78a/532467417/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
Donna Edwards for Senate
P.O Box 44305
Ft. Washington, MD 20749

name: Chairman Matt Borges
subject: I RSVP'ed, have you?
clean_body: | Peter -- A week from today, the Portman campaign will hold their second Super Saturday day of grassroots action! ? I'll join Rob at his Columbus stop, but he and Jane will be making stops across the state meeting with interns and volunteers and helping contact voters. The campaign has set an ambitious goal of contacting 50,000 voters in a single day, and they will need your help! ! Since May of last year, the Portman campaign has contacted more than 1.5 million voters as they work to build one of the most impressive grassroots organizations that Ohio has ever seen. On Super Saturday, the campaign's interns, volunteers, and staff will be making calls and knocking on doors across Ohio. Rob and Jane will begin the day in Brecksville, and then Rob will make stops in Toledo, Dayton, and Columbus. Jane will make stops across the state and end the day in Terrace Park. The campaign's offices across the state will have special guests, including Congressmen and statewide elected officials. In this election, Ohio has a choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland’s failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government. National Democrats have their eyes on Ohio. ! Sincerely, Chairman Matt Borges Republican Party -=-=-

name: Team Sestak
subject: Progress Report on $100,000 Goal!
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998a/3476a20e/d81171e/274219c7/494703985/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, As you know by now, on Tuesday we begin the final week of the primary election and we will purchase our final week of TV spots. **We have been moving along at a strong clip toward raising the extra $100,000 Joe needs to ensure victory and overcome the $4 million in outside spending on my opponent's behalf.** We recalculated our progress at noon, and we are happy to report that [we now only need **9 in Cresco** to contribute in order for us to reach Joe's ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998a/3476a20e/d81171e/274219c6/494703985/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FBEOP3p1&amounts=25,50,75,100,150,500,2700")[- goal will you chip in today?](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998a/3476a20e/d81171e/274219c6/494703985/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FBEOP3p1&amounts=25,50,75,100,150,500,2700") | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998a/3476a20e/d81171e/274219c5/494703985/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FBEOP3b1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
Cresco has been stepping up to chip in. Please join your neighbors in standing with Joe against the outside special interest spending by [contributing $25, $50, $75, $100, or $150 to beat back their millions!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998a/3476a20e/d81171e/274219c4/494703985/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FBEOP3p2&amounts=25,50,75,100,150,500,2700")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998a/3476a20e/d81171e/274219c3/494703985/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FBEOP3b2&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
Respectfully,
Team Sestak

name: Jake Sternberger, Team Sestak
subject: This is unprecedented
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998d/3476a20e/d81b5ae/27421e95/2671920138/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, **Just under $4 million in Democratic outside money is being wasted in this race to try and sink the Admiral** , _all because of the personal whim of a Senator in D.C. who cannot stand Joe 's independence - of him, and for the people._ _And that 's even though Joe Sestak has a flawless voting record on the issues that matter to people and __assuredly_ _Democrats_ :
* 100% rating from NARAL Pro-Choice America and Planned Parenthood Action Fund
* 100% from PennEnvironment and Defenders of Wildlife Action Fund
* 100% from American Public Health Association
* 100% from the National Education Association
* 100% from the Brady Campaign to Prevent Gun Violence
* 100% from the AFL-CIO, United Food & Commercial Workers, the International Brotherhood of Boilermakers, the American Federation of State, County & Municipal Employees (AFSCME), and Communications Workers of America (CWA)

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998d/3476a20e/d81b5ae/27421e94/2671920138/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FB2b1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
Understand what is happening, Peter.
**They are siphoning off $4 million that should be used to defeat Pat Toomey and Donald Trump, and instead spending those precious dollars to try and destroy the 17 point lead Joe had gained by talking to regular Pennsylvanians along city streets and country roads** - _and they are doing it by making untrue claims that independent fact checkers have found to be false._
Why?
_**Because of the personal whim of one particular Senator who hopes to rule the Senate with absolute control.**_ One wouldn't think we would have to say this - but please join Joe in standing against the reckless action of the Democratic Party leadership, including its reckless spending plan!
[Contribute today - $25, $50, $100, $250, or $500, ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998d/3476a20e/d81b5ae/27421e94/2671920138/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FB2b1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")[whatever](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998d/3476a20e/d81b5ae/27421e94/2671920138/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FB2b1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")[ you can, so we win for people!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998d/3476a20e/d81b5ae/27421e94/2671920138/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FB2b1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171998d/3476a20e/d81b5ae/27421e93/2671920138/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0416FB2b2&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
Very Respectfully,
Jake Sternberger
Campaign Manager
